$SAYLOR — TRANSPARENCY

Every claim, verifiable on-chain. Don't trust — click through.
← gaysaylor.com
~60% of total supply is timelocked on-chain. Mint & freeze authorities are revoked (nobody can print more or freeze wallets). Liquidity is founder-seeded on Meteora. The founder holds ~25% (15% treasury + 10% liquid, disclosed) and ~12% is genuine community float held by other wallets. Total supply: 1,000,000,000 $SAYLOR (Token-2022).

🔒 Locks & Authorities

WhatAmountTermsVerify
Supply timelock #1 ~275.4M public timelock (StakePoint, PDA) lock page · tx
Supply timelock #2 ~270.5M public timelock (StakePoint, PDA) lock page · tx
Founder lock ~49M 6-month lock (StakePoint, PDA) lock page · tx
Mint authority REVOKED ✅ no more can ever be minted token page
Freeze authority REVOKED ✅ no wallet can be frozen token page

Locks are held in on-chain Program Derived Addresses (PDAs) — no private key can withdraw them before the unlock date. Amounts are net of StakePoint's 2% lock fee.

🌊 Liquidity

WhatDetailsVerify
Meteora DAMM v2 pool $SAYLOR / SOL · founder-seeded · 4% swap fee
Fees split 25% treasury / 75% founder. Perma-lock optional/pending.		 pool · solscan

All names and likenesses are used for parody and commentary. $SAYLOR is NOT an investment, security, or financial product, carries no expectation of profit, and confers no claim on any entity. A majority of supply is timelocked with public unlock dates; the founder still holds ~25% (treasury + liquid), disclosed openly above. Memecoins are extremely high risk — you can lose everything.
